app.name: SafetyHub
app.tagline: Find what you need, right now, right here.

offline.banner: Offline — emergency numbers and saved contacts still work

sos.aria: Send SOS to your emergency contacts
sos.noContactsHint: Add an emergency contact in Contacts so SOS has somewhere to send your location.
sos.countdown: Sending your location to {{count}} contact(s) in
sos.noContactsBody: Add an emergency contact first so SOS has somewhere to send your location.
sos.noLocationBody: Check location permissions and try again.
sos.readyBody: Tap to send your location to each contact. We tried to open the first automatically.

contacts.title: Emergency contacts
contacts.subtitle: These are who SOS alerts your live location to. {{count}}/{{max}} saved.
contacts.empty: No contacts yet. Add someone who should know if you're in trouble.
contacts.name: Name
contacts.errRequired: Name and phone number are required.
contacts.errLimit: You can save up to {{max}} contacts.
contacts.errDuplicate: This phone number is already saved.
contacts.limitReached: You've reached the {{max}}-contact limit. Remove one to add another.

map.searchAria: Search for a city or place
map.locationOff: Location is off. Search a city above to see nearby help.
map.sampleData: Showing sample data — live results unavailable
map.loadError: Couldn't load places — no cached data yet
map.emptyList: No places found here yet. Try another category or search a different area.

settings.title: Settings
settings.languageHelp: Choose the language for the app and the voice assistant.
settings.regionHelp: SafetyHub detects your country automatically from your location. Override it here if detection gets it wrong.
settings.connectionHelp: Emergency numbers and saved contacts always work offline. The map and voice assistant need a connection.
settings.aboutText: SafetyHub is open source under the MIT license. Built for the OpenAI Codex Hackathon, July 2026.

voice.statusIdle: Tap the mic and describe what's happening
voice.disclaimer: Guidance only — SOS is never triggered automatically.
voice.unsupported: Voice input isn't supported in this browser. Try Chrome or Safari, or use the map and emergency numbers directly.
voice.errDenied: Microphone access is blocked. Allow it in your browser's site settings, then try again.
voice.errNoMic: No microphone was found on this device.
voice.errNoSpeech: I didn't catch that. Tap the mic and try again.
voice.errNetwork: Speech recognition needs a connection right now.

imSafe.sheetBody: Send a follow-up message to your contacts so they know you're okay.

qr.title: Scan to see my location
qr.noLocation: Location unavailable. Enable location and try again.

disaster.settingsHelp: Demo: show nearby shelters and relief centers as if a disaster were declared in your region. Works offline.
disaster.banner: Disaster mode — nearby shelters and relief centers are shown
disaster.sheltersSubtitle: Curated safe places for shelter, medical help, food, and water.
disaster.empty: No shelters listed for this area.
